---
title: "Tennis Models LOO Comparison"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    code-tools: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    mainfont: Georgia, serif
editor: source
---

## load packages

```{r}
if (!require(tidybayes)) {
install.packages("tidybayes")
library(tidybayes)
}

if (!require(tidyr)) {
install.packages("tidyr")
library(tidyr)
}

if (!require(brms)) {
install.packages("brms")
library(brms)
}

if (!require(ggplot2)) {
install.packages("ggplot2")
library(ggplot2)
}

if (!require(reliabilitydiag)) {
install.packages("reliabilitydiag")
library(reliabilitydiag)
}

if (!require(metadat)) {
install.packages("metadat")
library(metadat)
}

if (!require(cmdstanr)) {
install.packages("cmdstanr", repos = c("https://mc-stan.org/r-packages/", getOption("repos")))
library(cmdstanr)
}

cmdstan_installed <- function() {
res <- try(out <- cmdstanr::cmdstan_path(), silent = TRUE)
!inherits(res, "try-error")
}
if (!cmdstan_installed()) {
install_cmdstan()
}
```

# data

```{r}
data <- read.csv("master-sub.csv")

str(data$ServerWon)
str(data$BreakPoint)
str(data$Tiebreaker)
str(data$ServerId)
```

# keep relevant data

```{r}
df <- data[c("ServerWon", "BreakPoint", "Tiebreaker", "ServerId")]
head(df)
```

# Model 1

```{r}
fit_nonhier <- brm(
formula = ServerWon ~ BreakPoint + Tiebreaker,
data = df,
family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
prior = c(
prior(normal(0, 2^2), class = "Intercept"),
prior(normal(0, 1^2), class = "b")
),
chains = 4,
iter = 2000,
cores = 4
)

```

```{r}
summary(fit_nonhier)
```

# Model 2

```{r}
fit_hier <- brm(
formula = ServerWon ~ BreakPoint +
(1 + BreakPoint | ServerId),
data = df,
family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
prior = c(
prior(normal(0, 2^2), class = "Intercept"),
prior(normal(0, 1^2), class = "b"),
prior(student_t(3, 0, 2.5), class = "sd", group = "ServerId")
# prior(lkj(2), class = "cor", group = "ServerId") # uncomment if you want a prior on correlations
),
chains = 4,
iter = 2000,
cores = 4
)
```

```{r}
summary(fit_hier)
```

# Psis-loo comparison

```{r}
loo_nonhier <- loo(fit_nonhier, ndraws = 1000)
loo_hier <- loo(fit_hier, ndraws = 1000)

loo_nonhier
loo_hier
```

# direct comparison

```{r}
cmp <- loo_compare(loo_nonhier, loo_hier)
cmp
```

# plot

```{r}
# 1 row, 2 columns, with space for a shared outer title
par(mfrow = c(1, 2),
    mar  = c(4, 4, 2, 1),   # inner margins (bottom, left, top, right)
    oma  = c(0, 0, 3, 0))   # outer margins (space for overall title)

# No big 'main' titles here
plot(loo_nonhier, main = "")
mtext("Non-hierarchical model", side = 3, line = 0.3, cex = 0.9)

plot(loo_hier, main = "")
mtext("Hierarchical model", side = 3, line = 0.3, cex = 0.9)

# One shared title on top of both panels
mtext("PSIS diagnostic plots", outer = TRUE, side = 3, line = 1, cex = 1.2, font = 2)

# Optional: reset
par(mfrow = c(1, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 0, 0))

```

# Numerical khat

```{r}

# vector of k-hat values
k_nonhier <- loo_nonhier$diagnostics$pareto_k
k_hier    <- loo_hier$diagnostics$pareto_k

# quick summaries
summary(k_nonhier)
summary(k_hier)

# counts in the usual bins
loo::pareto_k_table(loo_nonhier)
loo::pareto_k_table(loo_hier)
```
